title: Crispy Herbal Baby Pak Choi Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly herbal stir-fry featuring baby pak choi, marinated in a tangy sauce before cooking for a crispy texture and nostalgic Jamaican twist.
instructions: Wash baby pak choi thoroughly and cut into bite-sized pieces.
Mix marinade ingredients in a bowl. Add the washed baby pak choi, ensuring each piece is coated evenly with the sauce. Let it marinate for at least 30 minutes (or longer if you have time).
Preheat your wok or skillet over medium-high heat and add oil. Once hot, carefully add the marinated baby pak choi to the pan.
Cook until the pak choi is wilted but still has a slight crunch, about 3-5 minutes. You can stir occasionally for even cooking.
Sprinkle sesame seeds or crushed nuts over the top if desired and serve immediately while hot.
